languages.text: "Было бы несправедливо, если бы я разрешил{mf||а} аугментацию одному и отказал{mf||а} остальным. С сего дня дозволяю аугментировать подданных с нижних палуб!"
"It would be unfair if I allowed augmetics for one and denied the rest. From this day on, subjects from the lower decks will be granted access to augmentation!"
languages.original_text: "Было бы несправедливо, если бы я разрешил{mf||а} аугментацию одному и отказал{mf||а} остальным. С сего дня дозволяю аугментировать подданных с нижних палуб!"

traits.locale_text: "It would be unfair if I allowed augmetics for one and denied the rest. From this day on, subjects from the lower decks will be granted access to augmentation!"
"It would be unfair if I allowed augmetics for one and denied the rest. From this day on, subjects from the lower decks will be granted access to augmentation!"
"It would be unfair if I allowed augmetics for one and denied the rest. From this day on, subjects from the lower decks will be granted access to augmentation!"

languages.text: 「もし、一部の人だけを拡張手術に許可し、他の人を拒否すれば、それは不公平だ。この日から、下甲板の被験者も拡張手術を受ける権利を得る！」
languages.original_text: "It would be unfair if I allowed augmetics for one and denied the rest. From this day on, subjects from the lower decks will be granted access to augmentation!"

traits.locale_text: 「もし、一部の人だけを拡張手術に許可し、他の人を拒否すれば、それは不公平だ。この日から、下甲板の被験者も拡張手術を受ける権利を得る！」

languages.text: "Bir kişiye ogmetik verip kalanlara vermesem haksızlık olurdu. Bugünden itibaren alt güvertedeki tebaanın ogmentasyona erişimi olacak!"
languages.original_text: "It would be unfair if I allowed augmetics for one and denied the rest. From this day on, subjects from the lower decks will be granted access to augmentation!"

traits.locale_text: "Bir kişiye ogmetik verip kalanlara vermesem haksızlık olurdu. Bugünden itibaren alt güvertedeki tebaanın ogmentasyona erişimi olacak!"

languages.text: «Sería injusto permitir auméticos para unos y denegarlos para los demás. ¡A partir del día de hoy, los súbditos de las cubiertas inferiores tendrán acceso a los aumentos!».
languages.original_text: "It would be unfair if I allowed augmetics for one and denied the rest. From this day on, subjects from the lower decks will be granted access to augmentation!"

traits.locale_text: «Sería injusto permitir auméticos para unos y denegarlos para los demás. ¡A partir del día de hoy, los súbditos de las cubiertas inferiores tendrán acceso a los aumentos!».

languages.text: “若我允许一人使用植入物，却拒绝余下众人，未免有失公允。即日起，下层甲板的子民们都将获准接受植入物改造！”
languages.original_text: "It would be unfair if I allowed augmetics for one and denied the rest. From this day on, subjects from the lower decks will be granted access to augmentation!"

traits.locale_text: “若我允许一人使用植入物，却拒绝余下众人，未免有失公允。即日起，下层甲板的子民们都将获准接受植入物改造！”

languages.text: « Il serait injuste d'autoriser l'augmentation de certains et de la refuser à d'autres. À partir d'aujourd'hui, les sujets des ponts inférieurs auront accès aux augmétiques ! »
languages.original_text: "It would be unfair if I allowed augmetics for one and denied the rest. From this day on, subjects from the lower decks will be granted access to augmentation!"

traits.locale_text: « Il serait injuste d'autoriser l'augmentation de certains et de la refuser à d'autres. À partir d'aujourd'hui, les sujets des ponts inférieurs auront accès aux augmétiques ! »

languages.text: "Es wäre ungerecht, manchen Augmentationen zu erlauben und sie dem Rest zu verweigern. Von heute an erhalten Untertanen von den unteren Decks Zugang zu Augmentationen!"
languages.original_text: "It would be unfair if I allowed augmetics for one and denied the rest. From this day on, subjects from the lower decks will be granted access to augmentation!"

traits.locale_text: "Es wäre ungerecht, manchen Augmentationen zu erlauben und sie dem Rest zu verweigern. Von heute an erhalten Untertanen von den unteren Decks Zugang zu Augmentationen!"
